content: To maintain brainpower on a low calorie diet, coconut oil can be taken in small doses throughout the day.
Coconut oil contains medium-chain triglycerides (MCTs) that can be immediately used as energy by the brain and body.
Coconut oil reduces cortisol levels in the body, which helps prevent cognitive decline.
Bulletproof coffee includes coffee blended with grass-fed, unsalted butter and MCTs.
Bulletproof coffee contains caffeine, which helps wake up the brain and improve memory formation.
Bulletproof coffee also includes MCTs, which provide immediate energy and reduce cortisol levels.
Ashwaganda root is a supplement that helps balance biochemicals in the brain and body.
Ashwaganda boosts GABA receptors and serotonin, improving mental clarity and reducing anxiety.
Ashwaganda blocks cortisol receptor sites, helping to combat stress and keep the brain clear and focused.
